summary: Codex-recommended physical stock patches testing complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI verifications passed. Physical stock now uses direct upload flow (rejected from chunked), /physical-stock/dates endpoint returns sorted dates, /physical-stock/compare requires verification_date, apply-updates returns skipped_count, and frontend correctly handles partial updates.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend /api/upload/init returns 400 for physical_stock with 'direct upload flow' message (line 979-981 in server.py)
✓ Backend /api/physical-stock/dates returns dates sorted descending (line 2604-2610 in server.py)
✓ Backend /api/physical-stock/compare now requires verification_date (not Optional) - returns 422 without it (line 2612-2613)
✓ Frontend UploadContext excludes physical_stock from chunked path (line 85: useChunked condition)
✓ Frontend PhysicalStockComparison fetches /physical-stock/dates on mount, auto-selects latest date (lines 33-53)
✓ Frontend PhysicalStockComparison uses Select dropdown for dates, no freeform input or Clear button for date selector (line 239-248)
✓ Frontend PhysicalStockPreview handleApproveAll checks per-row results and only marks applied rows as approved (lines 91-128)
✓ Frontend PhysicalStockPreview shows warning when updated_count=0 - no false success (lines 118-121)
✓ All data-testid attributes present for testing: compare-date-filter, physical-stock-preview-modal, apply-result-banner
seed_data_creation: None required - existing data used. Physical stock dates available: 2026-03-19, 2026-03-18, 2026-03-17, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Codex patches fully verified. Key endpoints: /api/upload/init (rejects physical_stock), /api/physical-stock/dates (sorted desc), /api/physical-stock/compare?verification_date=X (required param), /api/physical-stock/apply-updates (returns updated_count, skipped_count, results). Frontend uses direct upload for physical_stock, Select dropdown for date selection, and correctly handles apply results.

physical_stock_direct_upload_only.description: POST /api/upload/init with file_type=physical_stock returns 400 with 'direct upload flow' message
physical_stock_direct_upload_only.backend: server.py line 979-981 checks file_type and raises HTTPException
physical_stock_direct_upload_only.frontend: UploadContext.jsx line 85 excludes physical_stock from useChunked condition

non_physical_uploads_unaffected.description: POST /api/upload/init with file_type=purchase/sale returns 200 with upload_id

physical_stock_dates_endpoint.description: GET /api/physical-stock/dates returns sorted descending list of dates

compare_requires_date.description: GET /api/physical-stock/compare without verification_date returns 422 (FastAPI validation error)

compare_with_specific_date.description: GET /api/physical-stock/compare?verification_date=2026-03-19 returns data for that specific date only

physical_vs_book_auto_selects_latest.description: Physical vs Book page auto-selects latest date (2026-03-19) on load from /physical-stock/dates

date_selector_is_dropdown.description: Physical vs Book page uses Select dropdown for dates, no freeform input or Clear button for date selector

apply_updates_skipped_count.description: Apply-updates with nonexistent item returns skipped status, updated_count=0, skipped_count=1

preview_no_false_success.description: PhysicalStockPreview approve-all only marks actually applied rows as approved, shows warning when updated_count=0

playwright_test_results.no_clear_button_for_date: PASS - Only 1 Clear button (in Quick Stamp section)
playwright_test_results.no_date_input_type: PASS - 0 input[type=date] for verification date (uses Select)
playwright_test_results.summary_cards_visible: PASS - 4/4 cards visible (Book Stock, Physical Stock, Difference, Accuracy)
playwright_test_results.upload_page_physical_tab: PASS - Physical Stock tab with verification date field
